title: PwD - Access to Device Recommendations and Functionality - Functional Test Plan (33 Test Cases)
overview: Functional testing of SCRUM-110: PwD - Access to Device Recommendations. Validates Get Recommendation navigation, personalized banner display, recommendation toggle, catalog cards, filters, sorting, pagination, view details navigation, and responsive behavior.

testCases.title: Get Recommendations link is visible on Home page
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in and on the Home page.

testCases.title: Clicking Get Recommendations navigates to Catalog page
testCases.preconditions: User is on the Home page.
expectedResults: Clicking Get Recommendations navigates to Catalog page.

testCases.title: Catalog page URL contains /catalog/
testCases.preconditions: User is on the Catalog page.

testCases.title: Catalog page loads with product cards
testCases.preconditions: User is on the Catalog page.

testCases.title: Personalized for You badge is visible
testCases.preconditions: User is on the Catalog page.

testCases.title: Title Your Personalized Device Recommendations is displayed
testCases.preconditions: User is on the Catalog page.
expectedResults: 'Your Personalized Device Recommendations' title is displayed.

testCases.title: Subtitle text is displayed
testCases.preconditions: User is on the Catalog page.

testCases.title: Recommendation toggle is present
testCases.preconditions: User is on the Catalog page.

testCases.title: Toggle label says Show Only Recommended Devices
testCases.preconditions: User is on the Catalog page.
expectedResults: Toggle label says 'Show Only Recommended Devices'.

testCases.title: Device count hint is displayed near toggle
testCases.preconditions: User is on the Catalog page.
expectedResults: Device count hint text is displayed near toggle.

testCases.title: Toggle is clickable
testCases.preconditions: User is on the Catalog page.

testCases.title: Toggle changes state on click
testCases.preconditions: User is on the Catalog page.

testCases.title: Toggling on filters catalog to recommended devices
testCases.preconditions: Toggle is enabled.

testCases.title: Toggling off shows all devices again
testCases.preconditions: Toggle was enabled.
expectedResults: Disabling toggle shows all devices again.

testCases.title: Device count updates when toggle is activated
testCases.preconditions: User is on the Catalog page.
expectedResults: Device count updates when toggle is activated.

testCases.title: Product cards are displayed on catalog page
testCases.preconditions: User is on the Catalog page.

testCases.title: Product card has image
testCases.preconditions: User is on the Catalog page.
expectedResults: First product card has an image.

testCases.title: Product card has title
testCases.preconditions: User is on the Catalog page.
expectedResults: First product card has a title.

testCases.title: Product card has price
testCases.preconditions: User is on the Catalog page.
expectedResults: First product card has a price.

testCases.title: Product card has View Details CTA
testCases.preconditions: User is on the Catalog page.
expectedResults: View Details CTA is visible on product card.

testCases.title: Disability Type filter is present
testCases.preconditions: User is on the Catalog page.

testCases.title: Type filter is present
testCases.preconditions: User is on the Catalog page.

testCases.title: Price Range filter is present
testCases.preconditions: User is on the Catalog page.

testCases.title: Apply Filters button is present
testCases.preconditions: User is on the Catalog page.

testCases.title: Sort dropdown is present
testCases.preconditions: User is on the Catalog page.

testCases.title: Pagination is present when multiple pages exist
testCases.preconditions: User is on the Catalog page.
expectedResults: Pagination is present when multiple pages exist.

testCases.title: Device count text is displayed
testCases.preconditions: User is on the Catalog page.

testCases.title: Clicking View Details opens product detail page
testCases.preconditions: User is on the Catalog page.
expectedResults: Clicking View Details opens product detail page.

testCases.title: Product detail page shows product title
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product detail page.

testCases.title: Back navigation returns to catalog
testCases.preconditions: User is on a product detail page.
expectedResults: Back navigation returns to catalog URL.

testCases.title: Catalog page renders on mobile viewport
testCases.preconditions: Browser viewport set to mobile (375x667).
expectedResults: Catalog page content is visible on mobile.

testCases.title: Catalog page renders on tablet viewport
testCases.preconditions: Browser viewport set to tablet (768x1024).
expectedResults: Catalog page content is visible on tablet.

testCases.title: No horizontal overflow on mobile
testCases.preconditions: Browser viewport set to mobile.
